svg.text: 43-Voice and Text Chat
I. Voice and Text Chat Features

The voice and text chat management provides gameplay-oriented chat features. It supports configuring multiple exclusive chat channels for different players or factions. The same player can send messages in different channels simultaneously. Supports real-time management of player permissions through node graphs.
II. Voice and Text Chat Management
Manage the current level's chat channel through System Menu, then Manage Voice and Text Chat.
Global Settings
Enable Real-Time Voice Chat: determines whether voice chat is enabled.
Enable team voice chat in-game: determines whether team voice chat is allowed during gameplay.
Enable Text Chat: determines whether text chat is enabled.
Enable team text chat in-game: determines whether team text chat is allowed during gameplay.
III. Chat Channel Editing
Adding Chat Channels
Click Add Channel to create new chat channels. The stage comes with a default global channel that applies to all players. While its configuration and name can be modified, it cannot be deleted.
Basic Information Parameters
Index: unique identifier corresponding to the chat channel.
Text Chat Initially Active: determines if text chat is enabled at stage start.
Channel Application Method: supports application by player or by faction.
Apply to Player/Team: controls the initial coverage. Display Priority: controls display order.
Select Icon: controls icon and color in the in-level chat system.
Voice Chat Initially Active: determines if voice chat is enabled at stage start.
Limit Voice Chat Scope: restricts voice chat to a specific range. Listening Radius: 1 to 100 meters.
Quick Messages
Control quick chat messages for corresponding channels. Add or delete quick text. At least 1 default text must be kept.
IV. Controlling Chat with Node Graph
Set Chat Channel Switch
Toggle a chat channel on or off at runtime.
Set Player's Current Channel
Change which chat channel a player is currently using.
Modify Player Text Chat Permissions
Grant or revoke a player's ability to send text messages in a channel.
Set Player Voice Chat Range and Permissions
Configure a player's voice chat listening range and voice chat permissions.
Modify Player Channel Permission
Adjust a player's membership or access level for a specific channel.
Check Player Voice Chat Status
Check if the player is currently in a voice chat. This node only functions in multiplayer sessions.
V. Additional Notes
Voice chat buttons have been added to the interface layout. Craftspeople should adjust their UI controls to avoid obscuring these buttons, ensuring players can access the voice chat feature.
The voice chat buttons are located at specific positions on PC and mobile platforms. It is recommended to verify that no interface controls overlap with these button locations.
Voice chat nodes only execute in multiplayer sessions (Multiplayer Test Play or Multiplayer Play). They will not run in single-player modes.
AI Generated, based on Craftspeople Academy. Version: Luna 7
